title: Smart AI routing explained
summary: AI labs are shifting from pure scale to smart routing approaches that optimize for cost and trust. The technique directs requests intelligently across available models rather than defaulting to the largest model.
writeup: This IBM Technology video explains smart AI routing, the practice of directing requests intelligently across available models instead of defaulting to the largest one. It frames a shift among AI labs from pure scale toward routing that optimizes for cost and trust. The key takeaways: routing decisions weigh cost optimization and model evaluation, and matching a request to an appropriately sized model can reduce expense while preserving reliability.
